query:
Here is an establishment or group in the CHR sector (Cafés, Hotels, or Restaurants): Balsamique and its website http://balsamique-restaurant.com.
Optionnaly here is the address Wambrechies, FR and country code FR

I need to understand its current affiliation and group size.

1.  Determine whether this establishment is independent or part of a larger group
2.  If it is part of a group, determine the total number of locations owned by this group.

CRITICAL DEFINITIONS & CONSTRAINTS:

- Establishment Scope: Consider all food service businesses (restaurants, cafes, hotels, bakery, bars) the CHR sector.
- Input Flexibility: The name and domain provided may refer to a single location or the larger parent group. 
In all cases, these are the starting points for your search.
- Total Locations Calculation (Group definition): The term owns must be interpreted in the broadest sense. The total number of locations must be the sum of all sites directly owned/operate PLUS all sites operated via franchise agreements (Total = Owned + Franchised).
- Use the group's webpage centralizing all their locations, often called "our locations," "nos restaurants," or "store locator." to check the number of locations they display there.
- Final Result Selection: The final number of locations reported must be the highest total number found across all sources (webpage, store locator, reports, etc.). If only one location is found, the result is 1.
answer:
### Executive Summary

Balsamique is not an independent establishment; it is part of a hospitality group named "Les Maisons Bajeux" [Balsamique restautant - Restaurant Wambrechies - SITE OFFICIEL](http://balsamique-restaurant.com). Founded and led by Chef Benjamin Bajeux, the group currently owns and operates a total of **2 locations** within the CHR (Cafés, Hotels, Restaurants) sector [La Baratte - Reprise de la Baratte](https://www.la-baratte.com/fr/reprise-de-la-baratte.html). 

### Corporate Affiliation and Group Structure

Balsamique operates under the legal entity SASU LE BALSAMIQUE RESTAURANT (SIREN 493 461 537), a single-member simplified joint-stock company with a share capital of 7,500 Euros [Société LE BALSAMIQUE RESTAURANT à WAMBRECHIES (59118)](https://www.societe.com/societe/le-balsamique-restaurant-493461537.html). The restaurant's registered office is located at 13, Place du Général de Gaulle, 59118 Wambrechies [Balsamique restautant - Restaurant Wambrechies - SITE OFFICIEL](http://balsamique-restaurant.com). 

The establishment is governed by a holding company structure:
*   **Parent Company**: Since January 2, 2023, the sole shareholder and President of LE BALSAMIQUE RESTAURANT is the holding company BENJAMIN B (SIREN 918947508) [Société LE BALSAMIQUE RESTAURANT à WAMBRECHIES (59118) - 493461537](https://www.societe.com/societe/le-balsamique-restaurant-493461537.html). 
*   **Leadership**: Benjamin Bajeux serves as the President of the BENJAMIN B holding company [Société BENJAMIN B : Chiffre d'affaires, statuts, extrait d'immatriculation](https://www.pappers.fr/entreprise/benjamin-b-918947508). Sabrina Bertrand serves as the Director of the "Les Maisons Bajeux" group [La Baratte - Reprise de la Baratte](https://www.la-baratte.com/fr/reprise-de-la-baratte.html).
*   **Workforce**: The group employs a total of sixteen people across the businesses managed by Benjamin Bajeux [La Voix du Nord - Benjamin Bajeux reprend le restaurant La Baratte, là où tout a commencé...](https://www.lavoixdunord.fr/1333867/article/2023-05-30/benjamin-bajeux-reprend-le-restaurant-la-baratte-la-ou-tout-commence).

Chef Bajeux officially established the "Les Maisons Bajeux" brand following his takeover of his family's restaurant, La Baratte, on May 15, 2023 [Balsamique Restaurant - Benjamin Bajeux reprend le restaurant La Baratte et fonde Les Maisons Bajeux](https://www.balsamique-restaurant.com/fr/actualites-restaurant-proche-lille/baratte.html). 

### Location Portfolio and Group Size

The "Les Maisons Bajeux" group consists of exactly **2 CHR establishments**:

1.  **Balsamique (Wambrechies)**: Opened by Benjamin Bajeux in 2013, this is an active traditional catering establishment (APE 5610A) [Les Nouvelles Gastronomiques - Benjamin Bajeux fonde Les Maisons Bajeux](https://nouvellesgastronomiques.com/benjamin-bajeux-fonde-les-maisons-bajeux/). 
2.  **La Baratte (Tourcoing)**: The holding company BENJAMIN B has served as the President of LA BARATTE (SIREN 950382317) since November 4, 2022 [Société BENJAMIN B : Chiffre d'affaires, statuts, extrait d'immatriculation](https://www.pappers.fr/entreprise/benjamin-b-918947508). 

**Ancillary Services and Non-CHR Entities**
Alongside the two restaurants, the "Les Maisons Bajeux" brand operates a catering service, a boutique for wines and gourmet products, and seminar/reception services [Les Nouvelles Gastronomiques - Benjamin Bajeux fonde Les Maisons Bajeux](https://nouvellesgastronomiques.com/benjamin-bajeux-fonde-les-maisons-bajeux/). 

While Benjamin Bajeux is affiliated with other corporate entities—namely LA MALTERIE (SIREN 828714329), GABENCE, and SCI BCBG (SIREN 920022688)—these are strictly real estate investment and leasing companies (APE 6820B) [Benjamin BAJEUX - Dirigeant de la société Le Balsamique Restaurant - Verif.com](https://dirigeants.bfmtv.com/Benjamin-BAJEUX-1850643/). Consequently, LE BALSAMIQUE RESTAURANT is identified as the only active CHR subsidiary directly linked to the holding company BENJAMIN B, with La Baratte operating as the second affiliated restaurant location [Société BENJAMIN B : Chiffre d'affaires, statuts, extrait d'immatriculation](https://www.pappers.fr/entreprise/benjamin-b-918947508).

### Gaps and Limitations
*   **Timeline Discrepancy**: There is a minor contradiction in the provided data regarding the acquisition of La Baratte. Most sources cite May 15, 2023, while Gault&Millau reports the takeover occurred in 2022 [Gault&Millau - Benjamin Bajeux, Chef](https://fr.gaultmillau.com/fr/people/benjamin-bajeux).
*   **Financial Data**: The findings do not contain current revenue, profitability, or valuation metrics for the holding company or its individual restaurant locations.
